description: Decline path: stressed primary-metal manufacturer with DSCR below 1.0 under stress, elevated leverage, PE overhang, and short bank relationship. Agent rates 3-substandard; rules drive decline recommendation.

pipeline_steps.expected: dscr_base=0.98 (post-close on proposed $5M revolver), dscr_stressed=0.72; min_dscr_breach=true
DSCR covenant 1.10 already breached at close (0.98 < 1.10); leverage covenant 4.5 breached (4.95 > 4.5); violations_projected=true
DEMO-MFG-002 at 15th percentile on DSCR (1.09 vs median 2.88), 20th percentile on leverage
industry_risk_band=3 (elevated); NAICS 331 primary metals — cyclical, China import exposure
risk_band=3-substandard; rationale cites DSCR breach, leverage, PE overhang, compiled (not audited) financials
Credit memo drafted with DECLINE recommendation; narrative cites each deficiency with atomic-service citation

decline_reasons: Post-close DSCR 0.98 — below minimum covenant 1.10 at inception
Stressed DSCR 0.72 — insufficient debt service capacity under mild stress
Post-close leverage 4.95x — exceeds proposed covenant maximum 4.5x
PE leverage overhang not captured in bank debt; hidden leverage risk
Short 3-year bank relationship; limited credit history

demo_note: SYNTHETIC SCENARIO — tests decline path triggered by risk rating 3-substandard and covenant breaches at inception
